content.problemStatement:
"We’ve already come too far to end this now".

NNN players advance to the fifth round and the game is going to be Hopscotch. Every player has to select one mannequin before the start of the game.

Players are numbered 111 to NNN. You are given an array AAA of size NNN, where


If Ai=iA_i = iAi​=i, the ithi^{\text{th}}ith player selects their own mannequin.
If Ai=jA_i = jAi​=j where j≠ij \neq ij=i, the ithi^{\text{th}}ith player decides the mannequin for the jthj^{\text{th}}jth player.
If Ai=0A_i = 0Ai​=0, the ithi^{\text{th}}ith player hasn’t decided yet.
The VIPs want to know the number of ways that the undecided players can select mannequins such that everyone gets a mannequin, and no undecided players select their own mannequin.

**It is guaranteed that every (non-zero) element in AAA is unique**, i.e, if 1≤i,j≤N1 \leq i, j \leq N1≤i,j≤N are such that i≠j,Ai>0i \neq j, A_i > 0i=j,Ai​>0, and Aj>0A_j > 0Aj​>0, then Ai≠AjA_i \neq A_jAi​=Aj​.

Since the answer can be very large, print it modulo 109+710^9 + 7109+7.


Input Format

The first line of input contains a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first line of each test case contains a single integer NNN denoting the number of players.
The second line contains NNN space-separated integers, the ithi^{\text{th}}ith of which is AiA_iAi​ as described in the statement above.


Output Format
For every test case, print one line containing the number of ways undecided players can select mannequins for others such that everyone receives a mannequin, modulo 109+710^9+7109+7.
constraints: The non-zero elements of AAA are distinct.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test Case 1: There is no undecided player, so the number of ways is 000.
Test Case 2: There are 333 ways for the last 333 players to decide mannequins, all of which are listed below:

4→2,5→4,6→54 \rightarrow 2 , 5 \rightarrow 4, 6 \rightarrow 54→2,5→4,6→5
4→5,5→4,6→24 \rightarrow 5 , 5 \rightarrow 4, 6 \rightarrow 24→5,5→4,6→2
4→5,5→2,6→44 \rightarrow 5 , 5 \rightarrow 2, 6 \rightarrow 44→5,5→2,6→4

where a→ba \rightarrow ba→b means that aaa selects the mannequin for bbb.
